#!/bin/bash
set -e -E

GEMINI_API_KEY="$GEMINI_API_KEY"
MODEL_ID="gemini-3-flash-preview"
GENERATE_CONTENT_API="streamGenerateContent"

cat << EOF > request.json
{
    "contents": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "parts": [
          {
            "inlineData": {
              "mimeType": "application/pdf",
              "data": ""
            }
          },
          {
            "inlineData": {
              "mimeType": "application/pdf",
              "data": "<Drive file: 1xeZ1eTP32m_htGpbBKCGYKpL6d3pfY4P>"
            }
          },
          {
            "inlineData": {
              "mimeType": "application/pdf",
              "data": "<Drive file: 1ixkq7l5-6Sr92mMx-5fHMpVbUGlwgZAk>"
            }
          },
          {
            "inlineData": {
              "mimeType": "application/pdf",
              "data": "<Drive file: 1pkQIIDyzTB_Yu1H6e0iJkb83Ti8UboMJ>"
            }
          },
          {
            "inlineData": {
              "mimeType": "application/pdf",
              "data": "<Drive file: 1WXMg49pGfjOYA5VChFfoPSJdPiS1ffyC>"
            }
          },
          {
            "inlineData": {
              "mimeType": "application/pdf",
              "data": "<Drive file: 18b7bzOujdZK3oSWWYG3wR4oWX2L3XOmf>"
            }
          },
          {
            "text": "INSERT_INPUT_HERE"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "generationConfig": {
      "thinkingConfig": {
        "thinkingLevel": "HIGH"
      }
    },
    "systemInstruction": {
    }
}
EOF

curl \
-X POST \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/${MODEL_ID}:${GENERATE_CONTENT_API}?key=${GEMINI_API_KEY}" -d '@request.json'
